name: jetson-edgellm-v080-n2
description: v0.8.0 edgellm stack, N>1 + STREAMING variant (v080-0022). Same as jetson-edgellm-v080 but: (1) EDGE_LLM_ASR_STREAM_MODE=worker → create_stream() routes to _TRTEdgeLLMStreamingASRStream which speaks begin/chunk/end to the NEW qwen3_asr_worker (md5 f9bb821d, #9 N>1 + #10 streaming PARTIALs); each cumulative chunk yields a {event:partial} surfaced by the service as {type:partial,is_final:false}. (2) asr_max_slots=2 + EDGE_LLM_ASR_MAX_CONCURRENT=2 → backend emits --max_slots 2, WorkerIO Semaphore(2); 3rd concurrent begin → PoolSaturatedError → 4429. Requires the maxBatch=2 llm engine (EDGE_LLM_ASR_ENGINE_DIR→engines/asr-b2/llm) and the [1,30] minchunk1 audio encoder (min_time_steps=100, already on HF). mel_settings/mel_filters PCM assets at /opt/qwen3-edgellm-jetson/deploy/audio_preprocessing/ satisfy the streaming-worker asset gate. TTS path unchanged (generic-runner, concurrency 1).
